data.body: ENFORCE_SINCE ANCHOR MARKER (8d91 / dc09): this session_log commit is the enforcement-cutover boundary. Everything at/before it is grandfathered (pre-signing history incl. mixed-build unsigned writes); everything AFTER it must be signed. Chosen after the pre-flip validation window confirmed all active writers (local, CI reconciler, Gerrit review-bot, enrich drain, concurrent agents incl. 5c2eef83) produce signed events. session_log is gate-exempt so this boundary commit carries no enforceable event.
